DISCLAIMER: Please be aware that issues with the bot speaking for you; repetitive, gibberish, blank, cut off, out of character responses ARE NOT caused by the bot. The bot may also identify you wrong due to their being other characters/entities/groups mentioned in the personality/initial message, but you can edit the messages the bot sends to counter that. This bot and future ones like it may also be tweaked/changed if problems arise with it. genuine reviews are also always helpful to make sure the bots work well.
